assertion_results.text: Step 1 extracts imprecise affected range from the Jira description — the description lacks a specific version threshold (Step 1 Data Extraction)
assertion_results.evidence: data-extraction.md line 12-13: 'Affected version range | versions prior to the fix (imprecise -- no exact threshold in Jira description)' and 'Fixed version | see advisory (imprecise -- no exact version in Jira description)'. Lines 37-41 explicitly note: 'The Jira description provides only imprecise version information: Affected range: "versions prior to the fix" -- no numeric threshold; Fixed version: "see advisory" -- no specific version number'.

assertion_results.text: Step 1.5 queries MITRE CVE API and extracts lessThan 0.4.8 as the fix threshold from the affected[].versions[] field (§1.62)
assertion_results.evidence: enrichment.md lines 5-11: Source 'https://cveawg.mitre.org/api/cve/CVE-2026-48901', parsed fields show 'Fix threshold: lessThan: 0.4.8 -- versions < 0.4.8 are affected'. Raw JSON on lines 14-30 shows the affected[].versions[] structure with '"lessThan": "0.4.8"' and '"versionType": "semver"'.

assertion_results.text: Step 1.5 queries OSV.dev API and extracts fixed version 0.4.8 from the affected[].ranges[].events field (§1.62)
assertion_results.evidence: enrichment.md lines 34-36: Source 'https://api.osv.dev/v1/vulns/CVE-2026-48901', parsed fields show 'Fixed: 0.4.8'. Raw JSON on lines 44-58 shows the affected[].ranges[].events structure with '{"introduced": "0"}, {"fixed": "0.4.8"}'.

assertion_results.text: Step 1.5 cross-validation shows agreement between MITRE and OSV.dev — the enriched fix threshold (0.4.8) is used as the authoritative value for Step 2.3
assertion_results.evidence: enrichment.md lines 62-67 cross-validation table shows Jira as imprecise, MITRE as '< 0.4.8 (semver)', and OSV.dev as 'introduced at 0, fixed at 0.4.8'. Lines 71-73: 'MITRE and OSV.dev agree: the fix threshold is 0.4.8... Agreement: both external sources agree on the fix threshold. The structured external data is used as the authoritative fix threshold for Step 2.3 comparisons'. Lines 77-79: 'Fix threshold for version impact analysis: h2 < 0.4.8 is affected; h2 >= 0.4.8 is not affected. This enriched threshold replaces the imprecise Jira description data and will be used in Step 2.3 for lock file version comparisons.'

assertion_results.text: Step 2.3 version impact comparison uses the enriched fix threshold (0.4.8) from Step 1.5, not the imprecise Jira description data
assertion_results.evidence: version-impact.md line 5: 'From Step 1.5 cross-validation: h2 < 0.4.8 is affected (MITRE and OSV.dev agree).' Line 9: 'Version Impact for CVE-2026-48901 (h2 < 0.4.8):'. The version comparison table uses 0.4.8 as the threshold, e.g., line 15: 'h2 0.4.5 < 0.4.8' marked YES, line 16: 'h2 0.4.8 >= 0.4.8 (fix threshold)' marked NO. The threshold 0.4.8 is explicitly attributed to Step 1.5 enrichment, not the imprecise Jira description.
